name: validation of visibility and accessibility of main menu items after login

steps.name: Given I open the login page
When I login with valid username and valid password
Then I am  redirected to the homepage
And Main menu items such as Admin,PIM,Leave,Time,Recruitment,My info,Performance,Dashboard should be visible and clickable
Take screenshot and attach it to the report

attachments.name: Main menu items is visible and enabled

parameters.name: step_name
parameters.value: 'Main menu items is visible and enabled'

fullName: Validation of Main menu functionality: validation of visibility and accessibility of main menu items after login
